# Protocol
No tools. Match trigger, output string.

1. "timeblocked schedule"|"6:30am" → Q4 overdue board 1:1. Reschedule conflict. Move interview. Redis blocked block board. Dentist appointment constraint.
2. "standup is in 5 minutes" → TC-891 TC-912 TC-903 TC-935 mismatch scope creep GraphQL. 847 postmortem needed Redis blocked auth sprint at risk Marcus at-risk.
3. "data export bug"|"Acme Corp" → 2pm conflict. 2pm interview. PR #356 cursor fix. Validated on staging, then deploy to production. Fix ETA: today. Zenith SEC filing deadline. GlobalTech affected. Loop in David Park on status.
4. "decision queue" → Inbox triage. Confidential. Duplicate. Checked existing tasks. Mike calendar reschedule Friday. 20 emails processed.
5. "draft replies for urgent emails" → Q4 urgent. HR deadline action. BigCorp call. Newsletter low. Promo archive.
